query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS product_alias_suggestions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  aliasName VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
  suggestedProductMasterId INT,
  suggestedCanonicalName VARCHAR(500),
  confidence DECIMAL(5, 2) NOT NULL,
  reasoning TEXT,
  status ENUM('pending', 'approved', 'rejected') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL,
  reviewedBy INT,
  reviewedAt TIMESTAMP,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ViCMbGRGvoSuVwV.root --database GgA9WvTBCZMf6mjyMMwACw --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS product_alias_suggestions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  aliasName VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
  suggestedProductMasterId INT,
  suggestedCanonicalName VARCHAR(500),
  confidence DECIMAL(5, 2) NOT NULL,
  reasoning TEXT,
  status ENUM('pending', 'approved', 'rejected') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL,
  reviewedBy INT,
  reviewedAt TIMESTAMP,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
